raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad stahdiju es uhs tahm
leijas Weetahin pakkat to Muh-
ri/ un uhs tahm Augstibahin /
un liſku tohs Laudis pehz wit-
nu Raddeem/ ar faweem Soh-
bixeem/ faweem Schkehpeem/
un faweem Stohpeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un eṣuhsluhkoju/ vn zeh-
lohs/un tazziju us teem Augstnee-
keem/ un us teem Waldneekjeem/
un us teem Atlukufheem to
Lauschu : Ne bihſtecees preekſch
winncem; Atminneetees ta lee-
la bihjajama KUNGA/ un kar-
xojeet preekſch juhfeem Brah-
tem/ juhfeem Dehfeem/ un juh-
fahm Meitahm / juhfahin See-
wahm/ un juhfeem Nammeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tas notikkahs; kad
muhfu Genaidneeki bija dsirdej-
tchi/ ka tas mums bija finnams
tappis/ un ka Deens winno Pa-
dohmu btja isnizzinajis/ tad at-
greesamees mehs wiſi uhs to
Muhri/ iffatr̃s pee tawa Darba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no tahs Deenas dar-
rija weena Puſſe manno Jannek-
tu to Darbn/ un weena Puſſe
turreja tohs Schkehpus/ un tahs
preekſchturranas Bruxxas/ un
Stohpus / un Kruhſchu-Bruxx
nas/ un tee Wirfneeki stahweja
pakkat wiſu Juhda Nammu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kas to Muhri taifija/ un
kas to Nastu neſte/ un kas uhs-
kahwe/ tee wiſi darrija ar wee-
nu Rohku to Darbu / un ohtrá
turreja tee tohs Eerohttchus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Strahdneeki bijaik-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "katrs fawu Sohbinu ap fan
Gurneem johsifchi/ nn stra
ja ta/ bet kas ar to Basuni
te/ tas bija pee mannis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es fazziju us
Augstneekjeem/ un us teein
liſkuscheem to Lauschu :
Darbs irr leels un plats /
mehs effam afschkirti t
weens no ohtra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tai Weetâ/ kur juh
Basunes Skanu dsirdeteet
buhs juns pee mums fap
tees / muhtu Deetos kar
preekſch mums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta darrijam mehs
Darbu. Un weena Puſſe
teem turreja tohs Schkehp
kad Deena ause / lihs kam
Swaigsñs uhslehze.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es arridsan tazzijut
Laika uhs teem Laudim:
ikweens ar fawu Puſſi zaar
ți Jerusalemes Widdū pa
ka tee mums Nahti par Sar
irr/ un Deenā pee Darba
warr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un nedṣ es/ nedṣ m
Brahti/ nedṣ manni Jaune
nedṣ tee Sargataji / kas po
man stahweja/ mehs ne te
kan fawas Drehbes / un ti
ram bija fawas Bruxxas
Uhdens.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
